issues.question: Installation fails with permission error
issues.answer: Try running with administrator privileges or use a package manager like npm

issues.question: Command not found after installation
issues.answer: Make sure the installation path is in your system's PATH environment variable

issues.question: Node.js version compatibility issues
issues.answer: Update Node.js to version 18.0 or higher using nvm or official installer
